summary: Completed backend API regression and frontend integration/UI checks for FounderSea dashboard. Core requested flows are working end-to-end through public URL.

ui_bugs.issue: Console warning on initial render: chart width/height reported as -1 before layout settles.

action_items: Move backend secrets out of repository-tracked backend/.env and rotate exposed keys immediately.
Align TokenRouter model env variable naming: code reads TOKENROUTER_MODEL while .env defines TOKENROUTER_BASE_MODEL.
Replace hardcoded backend rewrite URL in frontend/next.config.ts with environment-driven backend URL.
Add /app/memory/test_credentials.md (or confirm intentionally unused) to satisfy required auth-testing prerequisite checks.
critical_code_review_comments: Security: sensitive API keys/private key are present in backend/.env and appear repository-accessible.
Configuration drift: TOKENROUTER_MODEL vs TOKENROUTER_BASE_MODEL mismatch can silently force fallback model default.
Env best-practice miss: frontend rewrite destination is hardcoded to http://127.0.0.1:8001 instead of env-configured backend URL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite added for all requested /api endpoints and passing using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000. Frontend flow checks passed for wallet toggle, metrics, filters, AI recommendation refresh trigger, revenue widgets, builder cards, queue stats, and CSV link. One non-blocking chart console warning observed.
rca of the issue: Primary non-functional issues are configuration/security: (1) backend secrets committed in .env; (2) TokenRouter model env key mismatch between code and env; (3) frontend API rewrite hardcoded. Reproduction: inspect /app/backend/.env and /app/backend/server.py tokenrouter config + /app/frontend/next.config.ts rewrite destination. Mitigation: rotate keys, standardize env names, and move rewrite destination to env variable.
